text: Hey, I just wanted to check in on you. I know you've been pushing yourself hard lately, and I think it might be time to give yourself permission to slow down for a bit. You don't have to earn rest — you deserve it just because you're human and your body and mind need it. Even if it's just stepping away from your phone for an hour, or going to bed a little earlier tonight, small moments of stillness really do add up. The world will keep spinning while you take a breath. Be kind to yourself. You matter, and taking care of you is never a waste of time.
